bullets.text: Blood biomarker panel from cycle 4 onwards
Formula rebuilds every cycle from your latest diagnostic

items.question: When am I first charged €99?
items.answer: Your card is authorised at order but charged only when your formula enters manufacture, around two weeks after you send back your sample. Nothing before then.

items.question: What if I don’t return my sample in time?
items.answer: If you never return your sample, a one-time €49 diagnostic-kit fee applies. Return it and there’s no separate charge, your kit goes straight into sequencing and then manufacture. We’ll send reminders, and the kit doesn’t expire.

items.question: What’s the difference between 4-month and monthly billing?
items.answer: Both bill monthly. The 4-month cycle (€99/mo) reflects the window biology needs to shift; the monthly option (€109/mo) trades a little price for the freedom to cancel anytime.

items.question: Can I upgrade to Advanced later?
items.answer: Yes. You can move to Advanced at any cycle boundary from your dashboard, your sequencing data carries over, and blood biomarkers are added from your next eligible cycle.

items.question: How does the diagnostic actually work?
items.answer: Shotgun metagenomic sequencing reads the functional genes in your gut at species level, what your bacteria do, not just which are present, located against 8,069 reference metagenomes.
